overview: Admission to Sanjivani Sports Public School is open to all students irrespective of caste, creed, or religion, based on merit and vacancy.
criteria: Age eligibility as per government norms.
Interaction/Entrance test for Classes I and above.
Previous school records and TC (if applicable).
rules: Discipline must be maintained at all times within the campus.
withdrawalPolicy: A month's notice in writing or one month's fee in lieu thereof is required for withdrawal of a student.
